/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/IntersectionLaneGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/KDCoord.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/KDSArea.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/KDSData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/KDSGMLExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/KDSNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/KDSWay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KDSSpatialProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o KDSSpatialProject
